title: Supplementary Materials for Stage IV Cryptographic Audit Validation: Methods, Protocols, and Reproducibility Outputs
author: Telles, Fernando
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This supplementary material contains detailed methods, audit plans, protocol amendments, results ontologies, and supporting outputs associated with the Stage IV cryptographic audit validation study. It includes no discussion or interpretation and is intended to function as a standalone technical record enabling independent inspection of study design, execution lineage, and reported results. All documents are provided as rendered representations of cryptographically anchored canonical artefacts, with provenance information disclosed where applicable. 
 
 Hash-only verification artefacts and analysis dataset: 
 Telles, Fernando (2026), “Stage IV Audit Reproducibility Dataset (HVT-A): Deterministic Hash-Based Verification and Human Verification Time Outputs”, Mendeley Data, V1, doi: 10.17632/fzw4pzkd83.1 
 
 Deterministic Extraction scripts (Python): 
 https://github.com/auditlogai/evidence-verification/tree/main/src/python 
 
 Statistical Analyses scripts (R): 
 https://github.com/auditlogai/evidence-verification/tree/main/src/R
